title: Influence of Proximity to Hazardous Waste Facilities on Asthma Prevalence in North Carolina
intent: To investigate how proximity to hazardous waste facilities affects spatial patterns of asthma prevalence across census tracts in North Carolina, with a focus on variations influenced by socioeconomic and demographic contexts.
data_requirement: Proximity data to hazardous waste facilities for each census tract
Asthma prevalence data for each census tract
Socioeconomic and demographic data for each census tract
data_available_sufficiency: The available data is sufficient for the research question as it includes asthma prevalence, socioeconomic and demographic data, hazardous waste sites, and geometric boundaries for census tracts.
data_available: NC_ACS_data.csv: Contains socioeconomic and demographic percentages for each census tract
NC_HW_sites.gpkg: Contains locations of hazardous waste sites with geometry
NC_PLACES.csv: Contains asthma prevalence data for each census tract
NC_tract.gpkg: Contains geometric boundaries for each census tract
